Kerala [1996] 2 SCR 23 : (1996) 7 SCC 637; P. Sambamurthy v. 
State of Andhra Pradesh [1987] 1 SCR 879 : (1987) 1 SCC 
362 – referred to.
D.P. Joshi v. State of Madhya Bharat and Ors. [1955] 1 SCR 
1215 : (1955) 1 SCC 58; Kumari N. Vasundara v. State of Mysore 
& Anr. [1971] Supp. 1 SCR 381 : (1971) 2 SCC 22; Pradeep 
Jain v. Union of India [1984] 3 SCR 942 : 1984 AIR 1420; Dinesh 
Kumar (Dr.) v. Motilal Nehru College [1986] 3 SCR 345 : (1986) 3 
SCC 727; Anant Madan v. State of Haryana (1995) 2 SCC 135; 
Rajdeep Ghosh v. State of Assam and Others, 2018 INSC 718 : 
[2018] 11 SCR 329 – relied on.
